page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for the evaluation of single-cell experiments. While its core functionality is the visualization of time-resolved, single-cell but also population data, it can be used for the automated/scripted analysis of data as well.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software for the evaluation of single-cell experiments. While its core functionality is the visualization of time-resolved, single-cell but also population data, it can be used for the automated/scripted analysis of data as well.
